## Description

Brief description of the change (e.g. new doc, fix link, clarify specification).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (broken link, typo, incorrect path)
- [ ] New or expanded documentation
- [ ] Specification or compliance mapping update
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Location

- **Files changed:**
- **Relevant docs/specs:**

## Checklist

- [ ] Internal links have been updated if files were moved or renamed
- [ ] Changes align with [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) and the [docs/](docs/) structure
- [ ] For specification changes: considered impact on [Implementation Guide](docs/guides/acr-implementation-guide.md) or other references
